fault_hypothesis: On line 67, the mean is computed by dividing by `window` instead of `len(tail)`. When the series is shorter than the window, `tail` has fewer elements than `window`, so dividing by `window` gives a wrong (smaller) result.

constraints.intent: After computing mean, it should equal total divided by the actual tail length, not by window.
The computed mean times the actual number of tail samples must equal the total.
The tail length is at most window; when shorter, dividing by window is incorrect.
The returned mean must equal total divided by actual tail length when warmup is met.
